productDisplayName: Nike Women As Jdi Pixels Blue T-Shirts
description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, interior neck taping for comfortable Fit and screen-print at front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean A slim fit and fun modern graphic team up in this nike Just Do It Pixel women's t-shirt with a classic, comfortable design.
